scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/cli build && bun run --cwd packages/n8n build && bun run --cwd packages/team-engine build
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/cli test && bun run --cwd packages/n8n test && bun run --cwd packages/team-engine test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/cli build:lib && bun run --cwd packages/cli typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/n8n typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/team-engine typecheck
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd packages/cli build:lib && bun run --cwd packages/cli lint && bun run --cwd packages/n8n lint && bun run --cwd packages/team-engine lint
